faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common in Mariners Harbor during summer?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are very active in Mariners Harbor from late spring through fall, particularly around the waterfront areas and residential neighborhoods with abundant vegetation. The neighborhood's proximity to wooded areas and industrial sites provides ideal foraging and nesting conditions. Peak activity occurs in August and September when colonies are largest and most aggressive.
